div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
USERS
─────────────
🔑 id INT PK
name TEXT
email TEXT UNIQUE
password TEXT
── WhatsApp (Rev05) ──
whatsapp_phone TEXT UNIQUE
whatsapp_verified INT 0|1
whatsapp_otp TEXT
otp_expires_at DATETIME
notifications_enabled INT 0|1
created_at DATETIME
updated_at DATETIME

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
CATEGORIES
─────────────
🔑 id INT PK
name TEXT UNIQUE
type TEXT income|expense
color TEXT
icon TEXT
created_at DATETIME

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
CUSTOM_CATEGORIES
─────────────
🔑 id INT PK
🔗 user_id INT FK
name TEXT
type TEXT income|expense
is_active INT 0|1
created_at DATETIME

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
TRANSACTIONS
─────────────
🔑 id INT PK
🔗 user_id INT FK
amount DECIMAL 10.2
description TEXT
category TEXT
date DATE
type TEXT income|expense
notes TEXT
🔗 spending_goal_id INT FK
🔗 saving_goal_id INT FK
created_at DATETIME
updated_at DATETIME

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
SPENDING_GOALS
─────────────
🔑 id INT PK
🔗 user_id INT FK
title TEXT
category TEXT
goal_type TEXT spending|saving
target_amount DECIMAL 10.2
current_amount DECIMAL 10.2
period TEXT monthly|weekly|yearly
start_date DATE
end_date DATE
status TEXT active|completed|paused
description TEXT
created_at DATETIME
updated_at DATETIME

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
SPENDING_LIMITS
─────────────
🔑 id INT PK
category TEXT
limit_amount DECIMAL 10.2
current_spent DECIMAL 10.2
period TEXT
start_date DATE
end_date DATE
status TEXT active|exceeded
created_at DATETIME
updated_at DATETIME

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
BUDGETS
─────────────
🔑 id INT PK
🔗 user_id INT FK
name TEXT
total_amount DECIMAL 10.2
spent_amount DECIMAL 10.2
period TEXT monthly|yearly
start_date DATE
end_date DATE
created_at DATETIME
updated_at DATETIME

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
USER_SCORES
─────────────
🔑 id INT PK
🔗 user_id INT FK UNIQUE
total_score INT
carry_over_score INT
level INT
league TEXT Bronze|Prata|Ouro|Diamante
current_streak INT
max_streak INT
last_checkin DATE
updated_at DATETIME

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
ACHIEVEMENTS
─────────────
🔑 id INT PK
name TEXT
description TEXT
icon TEXT
points INT
created_at DATETIME

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
USER_ACHIEVEMENTS
─────────────
🔑 id INT PK
🔗 user_id INT FK
🔗 achievement_id INT FK
earned_at DATETIME
UNIQUE user_id+achievement_id

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
BADGES
─────────────
🔑 id TEXT PK
name TEXT
description TEXT
icon TEXT
category TEXT
requirements TEXT JSON

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
USER_BADGES
─────────────
🔑 id INT PK
🔗 user_id INT FK
🔗 badge_id TEXT FK
earned_at DATETIME
UNIQUE user_id+badge_id

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
WHATSAPP_SESSIONS
── PLANEJADO Rev05 ──
🔑 id INT PK
🔗 user_id INT FK
phone_number TEXT
conversation_history TEXT JSON
context_summary TEXT
created_at DATETIME
expires_at DATETIME
updated_at DATETIME

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
WHATSAPP_NOTIFICATION_LOGS
── PLANEJADO Rev05 ──
🔑 id INT PK
🔗 user_id INT FK
notification_type TEXT
message TEXT
status TEXT sent|failed|pending
payload TEXT JSON
sent_at DATETIME
error_message TEXT
